prompt: Review PR #4250 in DataDog/dd-trace-go. It adds a twmb/franz-go Kafka integration.

assertions.text: Flags returning a custom *Client wrapper type instead of using the library's native hook mechanism
Notes that hook methods (OnProduceBatchWritten, etc.) need comments explaining when they fire
Notes duplicated or copy-pasted logic that should be shared or documented as intentional
Flags missing documentation on interfaces, types, or functions explaining why they exist
